proposal_summary: Gauntlet recommends setting the isolated debt ceiling to 0 for MAI/MIMATIC on Arbitrum, Optimism, Avalanche, and Polygon v3 to strengthen protection against risky borrowing.

disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: freeze MAI/MIMATIC and set LTV -> 0 ... recommends setting isolated debt ceilings to 0 for MAI/MIMATIC.
